args.body:
Dear David,

I hope this email finds you well.

As discussed in our team meeting on May 17, 2024, your task is to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project.

Please ensure that you begin coordination immediately and keep the team updated on progress.

The deadline for completing this task is: 2024-05-20

Please let me know if you have any questions or need any additional information.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
